description: Complex workflow: email extraction, domain and length

tools.email: Can extract email addresses and domains from natural language text.
tools.text: Can build simple strings based on instructions.
tools.stringLength: Computes the exact character length of the most recently produced text, avoiding counting mistakes.

prompts: From the sentence 'Contact support@example.com for help', extract the email address and remember it.
From that email address, get only the domain name and remember it.
Create the text 'Domain: <DOMAIN>' using the remembered domain in uppercase.
Finally, use the stringLength tool on the text you just created to compute how many characters are in that final text and answer only with the number.
